# pi-listen — Full Context for LLMs

> Complete documentation for AI assistants working with the pi-listen codebase.

## Package Identity

- **Name:** @codexstar/pi-listen
- **npm:** https://www.npmjs.com/package/@codexstar/pi-listen
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen
- **License:** MIT
- **Type:** Pi coding agent extension (pi-package)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **STT Backend:** Deepgram Nova 3 (cloud, WebSocket streaming)

---

## What pi-listen Does

1. **Audio fallback chain:** Tries sox, ffmpeg, arecord in order — works on most systems without extra installs.
2. **Pre-recording:** Audio capture starts during the warmup countdown — the user never misses the first word.
3. **Hold-to-talk:** User holds SPACE → audio tool streams to Deepgram → interim transcripts appear in editor in real time → release to finalize.
4. **Tail recording:** Recording continues 1.5s after release so the last word isn't clipped.
5. **60+ voice commands:** Session management, model switching, thinking control, display toggles, editor actions, dev commands, agent control — all by voice.
6. **20 punctuation shortcuts:** "period", "hash", "at sign", "dollar sign", "tab", and 15 more.
7. **Continuous dictation:** `/voice dictate` for long-form speaking without holding keys.
8. **Double-escape clear:** Two Escape presses within 500ms clears the editor.
9. **Zero-config start:** Auto-activates if `DEEPGRAM_API_KEY` is set. First-run hint with signup link if not.
10. **API validation:** `/voice test` validates audio tool, mic capture, and Deepgram key against the live API.
11. **Reactive waveform:** Audio-level-driven animation with fast attack / slow decay smoothing.
12. **Typing cooldown:** Space holds within 400ms of other keypresses are ignored — prevents false activation mid-sentence.
13. **Sound feedback:** macOS system sounds (Tink/Pop/Basso) for start, stop, and error events.
14. **Session corruption guard:** Overlapping recording requests abort the stale session before starting a new one.
15. **Cross-platform:** Kitty protocol + non-Kitty gap-based fallback. macOS, Windows, Linux.

---

## Architecture

```
Pi CLI (Node.js)
  └── extensions/voice.ts (~2128 lines)
        ├── extensions/voice/config.ts (~167 lines)
        ├── extensions/voice/onboarding.ts (~163 lines)
        ├── extensions/voice/deepgram.ts (~30 lines)
        └── extensions/voice/text-processing.ts (~184 lines)
        │
        │ Audio capture (sox → ffmpeg → arecord fallback)
        │ WebSocket (streaming PCM audio)
        ▼
  Deepgram Nova 3 API (cloud STT)
```

### State Machine

```
idle → warmup → recording → finalizing → idle
           ↑         │
           └─────────┘  (rapid re-press recovery)
```

- **idle:** Waiting for space hold
- **warmup:** Space held, countdown shown, pre-recording active (audio already streaming to Deepgram)
- **recording:** Live transcripts updating editor, waveform animation
- **finalizing:** Tail recording (1.5s) + CloseStream sent, waiting for final transcript

### Hold Detection

**A) Kitty protocol** (Ghostty, Kitty, WezTerm, Windows Terminal 1.22+):
True key events. First press → warmup + pre-recording. Release → tail recording → stop.

**B) Non-Kitty** (macOS Terminal, older terminals):
Gap-based. Counts rapid presses to confirm hold (REPEAT_CONFIRM_COUNT=6). Gap > RELEASE_DETECT_MS = released.

---

## File Reference

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `extensions/voice.ts` | ~2128 | Main: audio fallback chain, Deepgram WebSocket, pre-recording, tail recording, hold-to-talk state machine, 60+ voice commands, waveform widget, sound feedback, double-escape, typing cooldown, session corruption guard, first-run hint, `/voice` commands |
| `extensions/voice/config.ts` | ~167 | VoiceConfig type, load/save, schema migration, onboarding state |
| `extensions/voice/onboarding.ts` | ~163 | Setup wizard — Deepgram key entry, scope selection |
| `extensions/voice/deepgram.ts` | ~30 | WebSocket URL builder, API key resolver |
| `extensions/voice/text-processing.ts` | ~184 | Voice command detection (session, model, thinking, display, editor, dev, control), 20 punctuation/symbol shortcuts |

---

## Key Constants

| Constant | Value | Purpose |
|----------|-------|---------|
| `HOLD_THRESHOLD_MS` | 1200 | Min hold before recording activates |
| `TAIL_RECORDING_MS` | 1500 | Keep recording after space release |
| `RELEASE_DETECT_MS` | 500 | Gap that means "released" (non-Kitty) |
| `REPEAT_CONFIRM_COUNT` | 6 | Rapid presses to confirm hold |
| `REPEAT_CONFIRM_MS` | 700 | Max gap between presses to count as rapid repeat |
| `RECORDING_GRACE_MS` | 800 | Ignore release right after recording starts |
| `TYPING_COOLDOWN_MS` | 400 | Ignore space holds within this window of typing |
| `CORRUPTION_GUARD_MS` | 200 | Min gap between stop and restart |
| `MAX_RECORDING_SECS` | 120 | Auto-stop safety cap |

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/voice-setup` | Interactive setup wizard |
| `/voice test` | Full diagnostics — audio tool, mic, API key validation |
| `/voice` | Toggle on/off |
| `/voice on` / `off` | Enable / disable |
| `/voice dictate` | Continuous dictation |
| `/voice stop` | Stop recording or dictation |
| `/voice info` | Config + status |
| `/voice history` | Recent transcriptions |

## Keybindings

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `SPACE` (hold ≥1.2s) | Record with pre-recording + tail recording |
| `Ctrl+Shift+V` | Toggle recording |
| `Escape` × 2 | Clear editor |

## Voice Commands

### Session management
| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "new session" / "start over" / "fresh session" / "new chat" | `/new` |
| "compact" / "compress" / "compress context" | `/compact` |
| "fork" / "fork session" | `/fork` |
| "resume" / "resume session" | `/resume` |
| "tree" / "show tree" / "session tree" | `/tree` |
| "reload" / "reload extensions" | `/reload` |
| "settings" / "open settings" | `/settings` |

### Model and thinking
| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "switch model" / "change model" / "select model" / "pick model" | `/model` (picker) |
| "next model" / "cycle model" | Cycle model forward |
| "previous model" | Cycle model backward |
| "switch to X" / "change to X" | `/model X` (direct name) |
| "more thinking" / "cycle thinking" / "thinking level" | `/thinking` (cycle level) |
| "show thinking" / "hide thinking" / "toggle thinking" | Toggle thinking visibility |

### Display
| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "expand tools" / "show tools" | Expand tool call display |
| "collapse tools" / "hide tools" | Collapse tool call display |

### Editor
| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "open editor" / "external editor" / "vim" | `/editor` |
| "undo" / "undo that" | Remove last word |
| "clear" / "clear all" | Clear editor |
| "select all" | Select all |
| "new line" | Insert newline |
| "submit" / "send" / "send it" | Submit editor content |

### Control
| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "stop" / "cancel" / "abort" | Interrupt agent |
| "hey pi, ..." | Send message to agent |
| "hey pi, search for X" | Search for X |

### Dev commands
| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "run tests" / "run all tests" | `bun run test` |
| "run typecheck" / "type check" | `bun run typecheck` |
| "run lint" / "lint this" | `bun run lint` |
| "build" / "run build" / "build this" | `bun run build` |
| "install" / "install packages" / "install dependencies" | `bun install` |
| "format" / "format this" | `bun run format` |
| "commit" / "commit this" | `git add -A && git commit` |
| "push" / "git push" / "push this" | `git push` |
| "pull" / "git pull" | `git pull` |
| "show log" / "git log" | `git log --oneline -20` |
| "git status" | `git status` |
| "git diff" | `git diff` |

### Punctuation and symbol shortcuts
| Trigger | Inserts |
|---------|---------|
| "period" / "comma" / "question mark" / "exclamation mark" | `. , ? !` |
| "colon" / "semicolon" | `: ;` |
| "open/close parenthesis" | `( )` |
| "open/close bracket" | `[ ]` |
| "open/close brace" | `{ }` |
| "backslash" / "forward slash" | `\ /` |
| "hash" | `#` |
| "at sign" | `@` |
| "dollar sign" | `$` |
| "ampersand" | `&` |
| "percent" | `%` |
| "asterisk" | `*` |
| "tab" | Tab character |

---

## Configuration

```typescript
interface VoiceConfig {
  version: 2;
  enabled: boolean;
  language: string;
  scope: "global" | "project";
  deepgramApiKey?: string;
  onboarding: {
    completed: boolean;
    schemaVersion: number;
    completedAt?: string;
    source?: "first-run" | "setup-command" | "migration";
    skippedAt?: string;
  };
}
```

---

## Setup

```bash
pi install npm:@codexstar/pi-listen   # Install extension
export DEEPGRAM_API_KEY="your-key"            # https://dpgr.am/pi-voice
# Audio capture auto-detected: sox → ffmpeg → arecord (Linux)
# Install one if needed: brew install sox  OR  brew install ffmpeg
```

## Development

```bash
bun install && bun run typecheck && bun run test
```
